title: MCA: The Next Era
description: MCA:TNE is a magic and tech modpack that splices variety with QoL.
body:
Minecraft Comes Alive: The Next Era is a magic and tech modpack that splices variety with QoL.
Explore the many new Biomes and Dimensions, Become a master of many different Magical Arts, Become a genius with machines and mechs, Find new love in the villages, or Slay the many bosses and beasts that reside all over.

This journey is yours to make, so see it through and discover what's new in the Next Era!

 

This is a spiritual successor modpack to the previous Minecraft Comes Alive: The Forgotten Era Modpack that was released via Technic. This also has been migrated over from Curseforge, so things might be changed around to work with what Modrinth has currently.

Currently this modpack is on 1.18.2, with plans to move to 1.20 whenever it's final version releases.

The Modlist goes as follows:
